name: grok-it-mcp
description: Claude Code and Codex plugin wrapper around a local MCP server for Grok x_search, image generation, and video generation.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/make-bin-executable.mjs && node scripts/sync-plugin-dist.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run validate:plugin && npm run validate:codex
